meaning: n.法西斯主义者,法西斯党员adj.法西斯主义的,法西斯党的
examples: The German government has outlawed some fascist groups.
Because of his long time connection with people in power, Marconi was unable to cut himself off from the fascist regime in Italy.
The League of Nations' sanctions did not protect Abyssinia against fascist Italy.
Hitler and Mussolini governed atop turbulent fascist parties in uneasy collaboration with existing elites.
Mr Lieberman, the dark horse, is branded by the left as racist, even fascist.
